textPlain: I Am Sober is the most popular but it tries to upsell you so much. Weird when it does literally nothing except show your streak... glad to see some competition. I would use it but I'm on Android.
Just fyi - this app is from russia.And there are other free apps that do the same.
Where is the app to start e.g. drinking, it is morally relativistic to say these are 'bad habits'
Thanks! I really appreciate it — and yes, I’m planning to release the Android version next year.

Thanks for the note! The app is made with care for people everywhere, regardless of where it’s built.
And yes — there are other apps out there, but I wanted to create something simple, ad-free, and focused purely on supporting your journey.
Someone watched to much Rick and Morty.Self destructing behaviour and hurting everyone you love are imo not a thing to be snarky about.
